channel.title: 组件 on FutureLog

item.title: 组件示例
item.description: 1. Accordion Accordion Item #1 This is the first item’s accordion body. It supports HTML content. The item is shown by adding the value show to the class argument. Accordion Item #2 This is the second item’s accordion body. It too supports HTML content. Accordion Item #3 This is the third item’s accordion body. 2. Alert A simple info type alert—check it out! A simple danger type alert—check it out!
